name: michi
description: Michi tooling — small additions for Claude Code that complement the Michi toolkit's skills + principles. Includes both stable and experimental plugins; experimental plugins use the `experimental-` name prefix.

plugins.name: experimental-nudge
plugins.description: Periodic judgment-sequence nudge fired at every PostToolBatch. Surfaces a consideration prompt as a system reminder; the agent reads it and may engage. Pure salience, no gating. Experimental — not part of the regular toolkit.
